rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core argument: both study B2B/OEM-supplier purchasing agreements for engineered products in similar SIC manufacturing sectors and focus on governance choices and performance consequences. Even though the raw match evidence is only a DOI-level reference, the conceptual and empirical overlap is strong enough to warrant full relation judgment.
